headline: Applied ML Scientist, Recommendation Systems @ Meta | PhD Stanford | Prev. Netflix
summary: ML scientist specializing in recommendation and ranking systems, with a PhD from Stanford in off-policy evaluation. Leads ranking research for Reels at Meta; previously built the counterfactual evaluation framework for Netflix's homepage ranking.

experience.title: Applied ML Scientist, Reels Ranking
experience.description: Leads ranking model research for Reels recommendations. Shipped a multi-task ranking model that improved watch-time by 3.1% in a production A/B test across the whole surface.

experience.title: Senior Research Scientist
experience.description: Row-ranking and off-policy evaluation for the Netflix homepage. Built the counterfactual evaluation framework used to validate ranking changes before full rollout.

capabilities: Can design and validate off-policy / counterfactual evaluation frameworks for ranking systems
Can lead applied research teams shipping ranking models to production
relevance_summary: Lena is a top contact for anything involving production recommendation or ranking systems, especially where rigorous offline evaluation matters before a risky rollout. She has shipped ranking changes at both Netflix and Meta scale and is an active RecSys/NeurIPS reviewer, so she's also useful for research-quality vetting or PhD-intern recruiting pipelines.
